title: --dest-compress=none does not work as expected
body:
See:
```
sargun@ubuntu:~/go/src/github.com/projectatomic/skopeo$ ./skopeo copy --dest-compress=false dir:foo dir:bar
Getting image source signatures
Copying blob sha256:c0cb142e43453ebb1f82b905aa472e6e66017efd43872135bc5372e4fac04031
 2.21 MB / 2.21 MB [========================================================] 0s
Copying config sha256:ee4603260daafe1a8c2f3b78fd760922918ab2441cbb2853ed5c439e59c52f96
 1.25 KB / 1.25 KB [========================================================] 0s
Writing manifest to image destination
Storing signatures
sargun@ubuntu:~/go/src/github.com/projectatomic/skopeo$ file foo/*
foo/c0cb142e43453ebb1f82b905aa472e6e66017efd43872135bc5372e4fac04031.tar: gzip compressed data
foo/ee4603260daafe1a8c2f3b78fd760922918ab2441cbb2853ed5c439e59c52f96.tar: ASCII text, with very long lines, with no line terminators
foo/manifest.json:                                                        ASCII text
foo/version:                                                              ASCII text
sargun@ubuntu:~/go/src/github.com/projectatomic/skopeo$ file bar/*
bar/c0cb142e43453ebb1f82b905aa472e6e66017efd43872135bc5372e4fac04031.tar: gzip compressed data
bar/ee4603260daafe1a8c2f3b78fd760922918ab2441cbb2853ed5c439e59c52f96.tar: ASCII text, with very long lines, with no line terminators
bar/manifest.json:                                                        ASCII text
bar/version:                                                              ASCII text
```

My expectation is that the tarballs in bar would be uncompressed.

comments.body:
Per `skopeo copy --help`:
> Compress tarball image layers when saving to directory using the 'dir' transport. **(default is same compression type as source)**

This seems to work as documented, at least. Are we suggesting a different behavior anywhere?

(https://github.com/containers/image/pull/370 will add the technical capability to decompress layers while copying, so the capabilities of `--dest-compress` could be improved then.)
